# RAGFlow Field Guide

> A concept-level field guide to the RAGFlow codebase, written by Doc Holiday
> (https://doc.holiday) by exploring the RAGFlow source directly. Each page explains why a
> subsystem exists, its central abstractions, and how it relates to its neighbors.
> Every doc page is also served as plain markdown at <page-url>/index.md.

## Pages

- [The Big Picture](/docs/the-big-picture/): the map of the whole system
- [Anatomy of a Query](/docs/anatomy-of-a-query/): one chat question traced end to end
- [Anatomy of Ingestion](/docs/anatomy-of-ingestion/): the task-executor pipeline
- [The Chunking Template Zoo](/docs/the-chunking-template-zoo/): the chunk templates and their shared machinery
- [The Embedding Layer](/docs/the-embedding-layer/): one interface over dozens of providers
- [GraphRAG](/docs/graphrag/): knowledge-graph construction and retrieval
- [The Canvas Orchestrator](/docs/the-canvas-orchestrator/): the agent workflow engine
- [The Document Engine Abstraction](/docs/the-document-engine-abstraction/): one search API over Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Infinity, and OceanBase
- [DeepDoc](/docs/deepdoc/): deep document understanding
- [About This Site](/docs/about-this-site/): scope, audience, provenance

## See also

- Official RAGFlow documentation: https://ragflow.io/docs/dev/
- RAGFlow source: https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow
